summary: A Go-based test runner and assertion framework integrating MCP handlers, currently undergoing heavy automated test generation and feature expansion for its v0.16.0 release.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra test directories (0009-0025) suggests brittle test generation or flaky CI
Staged and modified files during release (v0.16.0) indicate potential last-minute changes
Heavy reliance on _extra_test.go files may indicate core test coverage gaps
Scattered internal packages across agent directories implies complex test orchestration overhead
suggestions: Consolidate or clean up the numerous GOrchestra/glm-agents iteration directories
Integrate valuable extra tests into the standard test suite to reduce maintenance burden
Review the staged/uncommitted changes before finalizing the v0.16.0 release
Focus on stabilizing the new test chaining and file_size assertion features added recently
